fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number to which the SKU refers to.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code (for example, warehouse of distribution center) to which the SKU applies.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line number of the comment.
When you create a comment for a card, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the comments in the comment table. The line number is specific to the particular comment.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comment.
